findings.title: Missing security header: Content-Security-Policy
findings.description: The HTTP response does not include the Content-Security-Policy security header.
findings.impact: Missing Content-Security-Policy may increase the risk of client-side injection and content execution attacks.
findings.remediation: Implement a restrictive Content-Security-Policy appropriate for the application.

findings.title: Missing security header: Strict-Transport-Security
findings.description: The HTTP response does not include the Strict-Transport-Security security header.
findings.impact: Without HSTS, users may be exposed to protocol downgrade or insecure HTTP connections.
findings.remediation: Enable HTTP Strict Transport Security with an appropriate max-age and HTTPS deployment.

findings.title: Missing security header: X-Content-Type-Options
findings.description: The HTTP response does not include the X-Content-Type-Options security header.
findings.impact: Missing X-Content-Type-Options may allow browsers to MIME-sniff responses unexpectedly.
findings.remediation: Set the X-Content-Type-Options header to nosniff.

findings.title: Missing security header: X-Frame-Options
findings.description: The HTTP response does not include the X-Frame-Options security header.
findings.impact: Missing clickjacking protection may allow malicious sites to frame the application.
findings.remediation: Set X-Frame-Options to DENY or SAMEORIGIN, or use an appropriate CSP frame-ancestors policy.

findings.title: Missing security header: Referrer-Policy
findings.description: The HTTP response does not include the Referrer-Policy security header.

cwe.name: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor

findings.impact: An overly permissive referrer policy may expose sensitive URL information to external origins.
findings.remediation: Configure a restrictive Referrer-Policy such as strict-origin-when-cross-origin.

findings.title: Missing security header: Permissions-Policy
findings.description: The HTTP response does not include the Permissions-Policy security header.
findings.impact: Missing Permissions-Policy may allow unnecessary browser capabilities to remain available.
findings.remediation: Configure Permissions-Policy to explicitly restrict unnecessary browser capabilities.

metadata.error: <urlopen error [Errno -2] Name or service not known>
